---
title: "Causality Notes"
---

# References

## Books

- Causality, Pearl
	- Date: 2009
	- Link: <https://archive.illc.uva.nl/cil/uploaded_files/inlineitem/Pearl_2009_Causality.pdf>
	- Notes: Foundation Resource

## Videos

- Simons Institute for the Theory of Computing
	- Link: <https://simons.berkeley.edu/workshops/causality-boot-camp/videos#simons-tabs>
	- Date: 2022
	- Notes: -
- Adele Ribeiro Lectures
  - Link: <https://www.youtube.com/@adelehelena/playlists>
  - Notes: -

## Lecture Notes

- Jonas Peters Lecture Notes.
	- Link: [https://people.math.ethz.ch/~jopeters/jonas_files/scriptChapter1-4.pdf](https://people.math.ethz.ch/~jopeters/jonas_files/scriptChapter1-4.pdf)
	- Date: 2015
	- Notes: Looks quite minimal, might be a good first read
- Patrick Forre and Joris Mooij Lecture Notes
	- Link: [https://staff.fnwi.uva.nl/j.m.mooij/teaching.html](https://staff.fnwi.uva.nl/j.m.mooij/teaching.html)
	- Date: 2023
	- Notes: Looks mathematically inclined with a measure theory perspective.
